data.title: Create artifact-merge-lib.sh with merge_config_file and merge_ci_workflow functions
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh following the ticket-lib.sh convention (shared lib at scripts/ level). Contains merge_config_file(), merge_ci_workflow(), and merge_precommit_hooks() (moved from dso-setup.sh).

### Functions:
1. merge_config_file TARGET_CONFIG PLUGIN_TEMPLATE DRYRUN
   - Line-by-line bash key comparison using grep
   - For each `key=value` in plugin template: if `^key=` or `^#.*key=` exists in target → skip (key present or intentionally commented out)
   - Exception: `# dso-version:` is reserved metadata — always updated, never treated as commented-out user exclusion
   - Missing keys: appended to target
   - Return 0 on success, 2 on conflict (with JSON to stdout)

2. merge_ci_workflow TARGET_CI PLUGIN_CI DRYRUN
   - Primary: python3+yaml — yaml.safe_load both files, merge job definitions preserving user customizations
   - Fallback: awk/sed block insertion when python3/yaml unavailable (same degradation pattern as existing merge_precommit_hooks)
   - Preserve x-dso-version key during merge
   - Return 0 on success, 2 on conflict

3. merge_precommit_hooks TARGET_FILE EXAMPLE_FILE DRYRUN
   - Moved from dso-setup.sh — identical logic (append-repos strategy, idempotent, python3+awk fallback)

### Platform detection helper:
_base64_nowrap_flag() — returns `-w 0` on Linux, `-b 0` on macOS via `uname -s`

### Conflict JSON helper:
_emit_conflict_json ARTIFACT_PATH OURS_CONTENT THEIRS_CONTENT — outputs JSON with base64-encoded fields using platform-detected no-wrap flag

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — RED tests from Task 1 turn GREEN for merge function scenarios
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh
- [ ] merge_config_file function is defined and sourceable
  Verify: bash -c 'source $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh && type merge_config_file'
- [ ] merge_ci_workflow function is defined and sourceable
  Verify: bash -c 'source $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh && type merge_ci_workflow'
- [ ] merge_precommit_hooks function is defined and sourceable
  Verify: bash -c 'source $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh && type merge_precommit_hooks'
- [ ] _base64_nowrap_flag helper returns -w 0 or -b 0
  Verify: bash -c 'source $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh && FLAG=$(_base64_nowrap_flag) && { test "$FLAG" = "-w 0" || test "$FLAG" = "-b 0"; }'

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.
